commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can keep the ADC marker fix while adding the missing non-secret-marker guard and regression coverage.; Needs attention: The diff can broaden generated auth config from env-var placeholders and known markers to raw setup-provider secret strings.; Review finding: [P1] Keep raw resolved keys out of models.json — src/agents/models-config.providers.secret-helpers.ts:339 (sha=2704593ff4ad1ac0568a44730e61225a147ab297)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes missing provider API-key synthesis to fall back from env-var-name resolution to the raw resolved env/auth value, and adds a Google Vertex ADC models.json planning regression test.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +56. Total +59 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main drops ADC auth evidence because resolveEnvApiKeyVarName ignores the gcloud adc source, and filterWritableProviders then removes model providers without apiKey. I did not run a live Vertex ADC turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can keep the ADC marker fix while adding the missing non-secret-marker guard and regression coverage.
